Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.

Video.summary: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Melissa Croden

HKFC 21 - Adam Zarrillo v. Mike Papesquash

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Fransisco Azevendo as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Cody Purtell at HK52.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 43 kicks off with amateur fights between 6'8'' Will Woo vs. Murray Hunter followed by powerhouses Riley Pequin vs. Levi Armstrong. And finally, pro fighter Jason Zentrgraf takes on UFC Veteran Nick ""The Promise"" Ring.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating matchup of Keegan ""The Condition"" Oliver vs. pro debut Derek ""Manchild"" Falk. This is followed by the entertaining contest of Aaron ""Vanilla Gorilla"" Gallant vs. Mike O'Neil, and the first Welterweight Title Defense for Sergej ""El Dorado"" Juskevic as he takes on challenger Lorawnt-T Nelson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 2

Bodog Fight - Tara LaRosa v. Amanda Buckner
Bodog Fight - Tara LaRosa v. Amanda Buckner

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 04

Video.summary: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis
Video.grandparentTitle: Finish of the Day - Connor Hayes - WCMMA
Video.title: Finish of the Day - Connor Hayes - WCMMA

Image.alt: Finish of the Day - Connor Hayes - WCMMA
Finish of the Day - Connor Hayes - WCMMA
Finish of the Day - Connor Hayes - WCMMA

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
